<a name="Provider"></a>
## type [Provider](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/http/http.go#L17-L23>)

Provider forwards Invoke calls to an HTTP endpoint as JSON POST requests.

```go

    // contains filtered or unexported fields

```

<a name="NewProvider"></a>
### func [NewProvider](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/http/http.go#L26>)

```go
func NewProvider(id, baseURL string) *Provider
```

NewProvider creates an HTTP provider that POSTs to baseURL.

<a name="Provider.Invoke"></a>
### func \(\*Provider\) [Invoke](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/http/http.go#L47>)

```go
func (p *Provider) Invoke(ctx context.Context, action string, params map[string]interface{}) (*core.ProviderResult, error)
```

Invoke sends action and params as a JSON POST to the configured baseURL. The response body is returned as ProviderResult.Data and the Content\-Type header is forwarded as ProviderResult.ContentType.

<a name="Provider.WithRetry"></a>
### func \(\*Provider\) [WithRetry](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/provider/http/http.go#L35>)

```go
func (p *Provider) WithRetry(count int, baseDelay time.Duration) *Provider
```

WithRetry configures the provider to retry transient failures.
